series_metadata.series_description: Information pertaining to disputes, hearings, or appeals. This includes evidence package, hearing decision, and appeal file. Dispute(s) regarding possible inaccurate toll transactions ( i.e., reclassifications of vehicle class, extended time on the Ohio Turnpike, authorized U-turns, credit card disputes, adjusted maximum fare toll tickets, stolen, other written requests, incorrectly identified license plate, or "not my vehicle").

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: account is closed and purged account is closed ; Electronic: account is closed and purged account is closed
